note: Recommended candidates for price validation slice v2. Selected for higher probability of admissible source: all are international PPE (Leightning/Titan/GasAlert) or industrial safety SKU with known distributor coverage.
rationale: Leightning series (1011994, 1015021, 1012541) all appear on honeywellstore.com, rs-online, cromwell, earplugstore. GasAlert accessories (129625-L3) and aspirators (121679-L3) appear on industrial safety distributors. Avoid PEHA BMS sensors (10xxxx) — no distributor pages found in v1 search.

candidates.reason: honeywellstore.com exact page confirmed in v1 search; earplugstore.com also found. High probability public_price.
Leightning series — same distributor set as 1011994 and 1012539 (already priced in pilot).
EU helmet-mount variant. Honeywell support confirms PN. cromwell.co.uk or rs-online likely carry it.
Industrial safety product, L3-suffix likely means size/kit variant. Grainger, RS, or MSA-adjacent distributors likely.
Gas detector accessories have strong distributor coverage on RS, Grainger, direct Honeywell pages.

skip_reason: PEHA BMS sensors and thermostatic valves — no international distributor pages found; require specialist HVAC/BMS catalog lookup outside current scout scope.
